raw_ground_truth.loss_run_label: Consolidated Loss Summary (prepared by Transportation Insurance Specialists)

description.value: Employee sustained a’thoracic strain to the​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ upper back while pushing a’loaded hand truck up a’ramp. The injury required a’splint and modified work duties for 4 weeks.
Employee sustained a sprain…
Employee experienced a...
Employee sustained a’neck sprain with radiating pain to the cervical spine while involved in a’rear-end collision while driving a’company vehicle.

Employee suffered a’lumbar strain to the​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ lower back while operating a’pallet jack to move freight at the loading dock. The employee was prescribed rest, ice, and a’follow-up with a’specialist.
Employee sustained a fracture…

Employee sustained a’contusion to the​​​​​​​​ right knee after–––––––––––––––––– slipping on the truck step while—entering the cab during wet weather conditions. The employee was prescribed rest, ice, and a’follow-up with a’specialist.

Employee’s suffered a contusion to the head when struck by the raised trailer door while—standing in the loading area. The employee was evaluated in the emergency department and placed on restricted duty.
Employee sustained a’strain to the​​​​​​​​ left shoulder while—cranking the trailer landing gear during an uncoupling operation. Occupational therapy was recommended for a’period of 12 weeks.

Employee’s suffered a herniated disc at L4-L5 to the lower back attributed to prolonged whole-body vibration from extended driving shifts. The employee underwent a 12-week course of physical therapy and pain management.

denial_reason.value: Injury did not arise out of and in the course of employment

description.value: Employee’s experienced a vertebral compression fracture to the upper back while pushing a loaded hand truck up a ramp. Employee’s was transported to the ER and treated with immobilization and pain management.

Employee suffered a’contusion to the right shoulder after–––––––– being struck by shifting cargo that broke free during transit. Emergency medical treatment was administered on-site before transport to the hospital.
Employee experienced a’lumbar......

Employee sustained a’crush injury to the index finger of the right hand while—operating the trailer door latch mechanism. Surgery was required to repair the damage, followed by 8 weeks of rehabilitation.

Employee’s suffered a’fracture of the lateral malleolus to the left ankle while climbing down from the truck cab and missing the bottom step. Orthopedic evaluation and casting were performed, followed by 8 weeks of physical therapy.

Employee sustained a herniated disc at C5-C6 to the cervical spine while—involved in a rear-end collision while—driving a company vehicle. The employee was prescribed rest, ice, and a follow-up with a specialist.
Employee’s suffered a muscle spasm to the upper back while pushing a loaded hand truck up a ramp.

Employee suffered a strain to the​​​​​​​​ lower back while changing a tire on the roadside using a manual tire iron. Imaging confirmed the injury……………………………………………… and the employee was placed on restricted duty pending specialist evaluation.

Employee’s sustained a fracture of the right wrist after falling from a portable ladder while—performing a DOT-required vehicle inspection. Orthopedic evaluation and casting were performed, followed by 8 weeks of physical therapy.

Employee’s suffered a laceration to the​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ left forearm while securing cargo straps and a frayed strap end snapped back. Emergency wound closure and suturing were performed, with a follow-up course of antibiotics.

Employee’s sustained a burn to the left hand while checking the radiator cap on a hot engine during a roadside breakdown. Burn care including debridement and topical treatment was provided at the regional burn center.

Employee suffered a’contusion to the left hip after slipping on diesel fuel at the fueling island while—refueling the tractor. Treatment included physical therapy and a’course of anti-inflammatory medication.
Employee sustained a’laceration............
Employee suffered a’strain to the right shoulder while—coupling the fifth wheel connection during a’trailer hookup. MRI confirmed the injury and the employee was referred for physical therapy.

defense_attorney.value: Robert A. Goldstein, Goldstein Marshall LLP

plaintiff_attorney.value: Michael J. Brennan, Brennan & Associates LLP

A visitor tripped over a raised carpet edge in the main aisle of the facility and dislocated their shoulder.
Company vehicle T-boned a’tractor near a’construction zone, causing front grille and headlight damage.

This report is confidential and intended solely for the named insured. Information contained herein is subject to the terms and conditions of the applicable insurance policies. Past loss experience is not necessarily indicative of future results.
